on_screen_text: I just knew I had been active
Mohamed Diallo's New York Knicks (lower-third name tag)
I just love it, it's just a blessing and
I keep looking forward to doing it
I'm just happy about it, you know.
frames.setting: Outdoor basketball court at night. Mamdani and another man (Mohamed Diallo, New York Knicks) playing basketball under court lights. Also shows iftar dinner table setting (close-up of food/plate).

iftar dinner table with food close-up
frames.presentation_style: Sports-lifestyle crossover. Mamdani playing basketball with a New York Knicks player during Ramadan. Iftar dinner component. Dynamic night basketball cinematography.

on_screen_text: And there are so many Muslims in the city
they don't get to have iftar, sitting down,
Right? They're having it while they're working.
It carries a different kind of resonance.
And growing up, I know it means so much
to so many young Muslim kids in the city
to know that the very basketball team
that there's someone on that team

gallery wall with framed basketball imagery
frames.presentation_style: Intersects Ramadan fasting and basketball culture. Interview-style conversation between Mamdani and Diallo about Muslim identity in sports. Personal and community-focused.
